description: Your organization's CISO has requested a forward-looking projection of authentication failure volumes to justify a new multi-factor authentication (MFA) investment. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!), analyze failed authentication trends in the `security_logs` index to create a time-series forecasting report. Create a saved search named 'Auth_Failure_Forecast' that identifies failed authentications, aggregates them over time, and forecasts future volumes on a daily schedule. Additionally, create a dashboard named 'Security_Trend_Forecast' that includes a visualization panel displaying this forecast data.
